title: Biome Intros (Lang)
description: Provides the translation keys for the Biome Intros data pack, made by TheKnytemayor.
body:
This resource pack provides the translation keys that are required by Biome Intros to display text and support translation to languages other than English. This pack automatically comes with en_au.json enabled. To direct the file to other English variants, rename the 'au' to whatever locale code you use (use snake_case).

Here's the format for Biomes and Structures:

```advancement.biome_intros.<biome|structure>.<biome_name|structure_name>```
